name: Veg Biryani
description:
Our rice dishes are a fusion of tradition and flavor, offering a hearty meal experience.
We start with premium basmati or jasmine rice, cooked to fluffy perfection.
Spices are roasted and ground in-house to bring authentic taste and aroma to every dish.
Try our chicken, lamb, or vegetarian biryani – each layered with flavor and slow-cooked to excellence.
Garnished with fried onions, mint, and boiled eggs, it's a wholesome treat.
Served hot and fresh, our rice dishes will leave you feeling satisfied and comforted.

name: Veggie Burger
description:
Sink your teeth into our juicy burgers made from premium cuts of meat and fresh vegetables.
Our patties are seasoned with a secret blend of herbs and grilled to juicy perfection.
Served in soft, toasted buns with a generous helping of lettuce, tomatoes, and pickles.
You can customize your burger with a variety of sauces and add-ons like cheese, bacon, or fried eggs.
Vegetarian and vegan options are also available, made with plant-based patties that don’t compromise on taste.
Every burger is made to order, ensuring maximum freshness and satisfaction.

name: Chocolate Donut
description:
End your meal on a sweet note with our delightful dessert options.
From warm chocolate brownies to chilled fruit custards, there's a treat for every craving.
Our desserts are freshly made with high-quality ingredients and lots of love.
Try our donuts glazed with chocolate or vanilla, or indulge in creamy cheesecakes.
We also offer ice creams in exotic flavors and seasonal fruit-based sweets.
Perfect for sharing or enjoying solo, our desserts bring joy in every bite.

name: Margherita Pizza
description:
Our pizzas are handcrafted with the finest ingredients, ensuring every bite is packed with flavor.
We use fresh, locally-sourced tomatoes for our sauce, slow-cooked to perfection.
Each pizza is topped with 100% mozzarella cheese and your favorite toppings.
The dough is made fresh daily, hand-stretched for that authentic, crisp-yet-chewy texture.
Baked in a stone oven for an ideal crust, every slice offers the perfect balance of crunch and softness.
Whether you're a fan of classic Margherita or loaded meat feasts, there's something for everyone.

name: Penne Arrabiata
description:
Delight in our pasta dishes that combine rich sauces with perfectly cooked noodles.
We offer a wide range of choices, from Alfredo and Marinara to spicy Arrabiata.
All sauces are made in-house with premium ingredients like aged cheese and fresh herbs.
Each pasta type – whether penne, fettuccine, or spaghetti – is cooked al dente for the best texture.
Topped with your choice of protein or veggies, every bite bursts with creamy or tangy goodness.
Served with garlic bread and a sprinkle of parmesan, it's a comforting Italian classic.

We use fresh, locally-sourced tomatoes for our sauce, slow-cooked to perfection.
Each pizza is topped with 100% mozzarella cheese and your favorite toppings.
The dough is made fresh daily, hand-stretched for that authentic, crisp-yet-chewy texture.
Baked in a stone oven for an ideal crust, every slice offers the perfect balance of crunch and softness.
Whether you're a fan of classic Margherita or loaded meat feasts, there's something for everyone.

name: Veg Biryani
description:
Our rice dishes are a fusion of tradition and flavor, offering a hearty meal experience.
We start with premium basmati or jasmine rice, cooked to fluffy perfection.
Spices are roasted and ground in-house to bring authentic taste and aroma to every dish.
Try our chicken, lamb, or vegetarian biryani – each layered with flavor and slow-cooked to excellence.
Garnished with fried onions, mint, and boiled eggs, it's a wholesome treat.
Served hot and fresh, our rice dishes will leave you feeling satisfied and comforted.

name: Veggie Burger
description:
Sink your teeth into our juicy burgers made from premium cuts of meat and fresh vegetables.
Our patties are seasoned with a secret blend of herbs and grilled to juicy perfection.
Served in soft, toasted buns with a generous helping of lettuce, tomatoes, and pickles.
You can customize your burger with a variety of sauces and add-ons like cheese, bacon, or fried eggs.
Vegetarian and vegan options are also available, made with plant-based patties that don’t compromise on taste.
Every burger is made to order, ensuring maximum freshness and satisfaction.

name: Pepperoni Pizza
description:
Our pizzas are handcrafted with the finest ingredients, ensuring every bite is packed with flavor.
We use fresh, locally-sourced tomatoes for our sauce, slow-cooked to perfection.

The dough is made fresh daily, hand-stretched for that authentic, crisp-yet-chewy texture.
Baked in a stone oven for an ideal crust, every slice offers the perfect balance of crunch and softness.
Whether you're a fan of classic Margherita or loaded meat feasts, there's something for everyone.

name: Chocolate Donut
description:
End your meal on a sweet note with our delightful dessert options.
From warm chocolate brownies to chilled fruit custards, there's a treat for every craving.
Our desserts are freshly made with high-quality ingredients and lots of love.
Try our donuts glazed with chocolate or vanilla, or indulge in creamy cheesecakes.
We also offer ice creams in exotic flavors and seasonal fruit-based sweets.
Perfect for sharing or enjoying solo, our desserts bring joy in every bite.

name: Spaghetti Bolognese
description:
Delight in our pasta dishes that combine rich sauces with perfectly cooked noodles.
We offer a wide range of choices, from Alfredo and Marinara to spicy Arrabiata.
All sauces are made in-house with premium ingredients like aged cheese and fresh herbs.
Each pasta type – whether penne, fettuccine, or spaghetti – is cooked al dente for the best texture.
Topped with your choice of protein or veggies, every bite bursts with creamy or tangy goodness.
Served with garlic bread and a sprinkle of parmesan, it's a comforting Italian classic.
